title: DeskMatch
tagline: Kubernetes-powered workspace booking platform — live in production
description: Smart desk booking and workspace management platform where companies list office spaces and users discover, book, review, and pay for workspaces. Built as a production-grade microservices system, deployed to a real public URL, and led as Technical Lead & Product Owner of an 11-person team.
highlights: Technical Lead & Product Owner of an 11-person team — owned architecture, backlog, and delivery
5 backend services (.NET 8) behind a YARP API gateway, each owning its bounded context and PostgreSQL database with serializable transactional consistency, latency optimized with Redis
CQRS + Vertical Slice Architecture implemented from scratch
AI-powered hybrid semantic search: a local LLM (Ollama) extracts structured filters from natural-language queries, combined with vector embeddings + keyword + geo search on OpenSearch
Full observability: OpenTelemetry tracing with Jaeger, Prometheus/Grafana dashboards, Loki logs
Docker, Kubernetes (kustomize) and Helm deployments with GitHub Actions CI/CD and robust xUnit test coverage
Payments, QR check-in, KYB verification, PDF invoicing, interactive maps, analytics dashboards
